              }
            }
          ]
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Reconcile",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Creates a new changelist and reconciles a set of files to submit to a Perforce stream.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Description",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The description for the submitted changelist.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Files",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileSpec",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The files to reconcile.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Directories",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The directories to reconcile, semi-colon delimited, relative p4 syntax.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Workspace",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The workspace name. If specified, a new workspace will be created using the given stream and root directory to submit the files. If not, the current workspace will be used.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Stream",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The stream for the workspace -- defaults to the current stream. Ignored unless the Workspace attribute is also specified.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Branch",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Branch for the workspace (legacy P4 depot path). May not be used in conjunction with Stream. ",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "RootDir",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "DirectoryReference",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Root directory for the stream. If not specified, defaults to the current root directory.  ",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Force",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Boolean",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Force the submit to happen -- even if a resolve is needed (always accept current version).",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "P4Verbose",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Boolean",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Allow verbose P4 output (spew).",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Preview",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }

          ],

              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],

              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Runs a reconcile preview, does not submit.   ",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false

            }

        ],

          [

              "settings": {

              }
            }

      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Rename",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Renames a file, or group of files.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Files",

              }

          ],

              "type": "paragraph",

                "is_hidden": false
              }

          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The file or files to rename.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "From",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],

            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The current file name, or pattern to match (for example, *.txt). Should not include any path separators.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "To",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The new name for the file(s). Should not include any path separators.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",

              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Tag to be applied to the renamed files.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [

              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If",

        "is_hidden": false

    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "SanitizeReceipt",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Task that tags build products and/or runtime dependencies by reading from *.target files.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Files",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileSpec",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Set of receipt files (<code>*.target</code>) to read, including wildcards and tag names, separated by semicolons.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "EngineDir",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "DirectoryReference",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Path to the Engine folder, used to expand $(EngineDir) properties in receipt files. Defaults to the Engine directory for the current workspace.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Condition",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Whether to execute this task. It is ignored if this condition evaluates to false.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "SetVersion",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Updates the local version files (Engine/Source/Runtime/Launch/Resources/Version.h, Engine/Build/Build.version, and Engine/Source/Programs/Shared/Metadata.cs) with the given version information.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Change",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Integer",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The changelist to set in the version files.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "CompatibleChange",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Integer",

                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],

            {

              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The engine compatible changelist to set in the version files.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Branch",

              }

              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],

                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],

              }

          ],

              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],

              }

              }

          [

              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The URL for a running continuous integration job.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Licensee",

                "is_hidden": false
              }

            }
          ],

            {

                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {

              "content": "Whether to set the IS_LICENSEE_VERSION flag to true.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }

        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",

          ],

            }
          ],
          [
            {

              "content": "Whether to set the ENGINE_IS_PROMOTED_BUILD flag to true.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "SkipWrite",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],

            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Boolean",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If set, do not write to the files -- just return the version files that would be updated. Useful for local builds.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [

              "content": "Tag",

                "is_hidden": false
              }

                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Tag to be applied to build products of this task.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [

              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If",

      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },

      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },

        "is_hidden": false

    },

    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Strip",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Strips debugging information from a set of files.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [

                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The platform toolchain to strip binaries.",

              }

    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Submit",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Creates a new changelist and submits a set of files to a Perforce stream.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Description",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The description for the submitted changelist.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Files",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileSpec",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The files to submit.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileType",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The Perforce file type for the submitted files (for example, binary+FS32).",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Workspace",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The workspace name. If specified, a new workspace will be created using the given stream and root directory to submit the files. If not, the current workspace will be used.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Stream",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The stream for the workspace -- defaults to the current stream. Ignored unless the Workspace attribute is also specified.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Branch",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Branch for the workspace (legacy P4 depot path). May not be used in conjunction with Stream.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "RootDir",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "DirectoryReference",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Root directory for the stream. If not specified, defaults to the current root directory.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "RevertUnchanged",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Boolean",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Whether to revert unchanged files before attempting to submit.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Force",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Boolean",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Force the submit to happen -- even if a resolve is needed (always accept current version).",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "P4Verbose",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Boolean",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Allow verbose P4 output (spew).",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Condition",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Whether to execute this task. It is ignored if this condition evaluates to false.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "SymGen",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Generates a portable symbol dump file from the specified binaries.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",

                "is_hidden": false
              }

              }
            }
          ],

            {

              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "List of file specifications separated by semicolons (eg. *.cpp;Engine/.../*.bat), or the name of a tag set.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Tag",

            {
              "type": "paragraph",

              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "UseRadSym",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Boolean",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If set, this will use the rad debugger pdb symbol dumper as well as the rad symbol_path_fixer. ",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If",

                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {

              }
            }
          ],

              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {

              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
