      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "SymStore",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Task that strips symbols from a set of files.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Platform",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "UnrealTargetPlatform",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The platform toolchain required to handle symbol files.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Files",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "List of output files. PDBs will be extracted from this list.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "StoreDir",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Output directory for the compressed symbols.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Product",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Name of the product for the symbol store records.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Branch",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Name of the Branch to base all the depot source files from. Used when IndexSources is true (may be used only on some platforms).",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Change",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Integer",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Changelist to which all the depot source files have been synced to. Used when IndexSources is true (may be used only on some platforms).",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "BuildVersion",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "BuildVersion associated with these symbols. Used for clean-up in AgeStore by matching this version against a directory name in a build share.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "IndexSources",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Boolean",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Whether to include the source code index in the uploaded symbols. When enabled, the task will generate data required by a source server (only some platforms and source control servers are supported). The source server allows debuggers to automatically fetch the matching source code when debbugging builds or analyzing dumps.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "SourceFiles",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Filter for the depot source files that are to be indexed. It's a semicolon-separated list of perforce filter e.g. Engine/....cpp;Engine/....h. It may also be a name of a previously defined tag e.g. \"#SourceFiles Used when IndexSources is true (may be used only on some platforms).",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Condition",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Whether to execute this task. It is ignored if this condition evaluates to false.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Tag",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Applies a tag to a given set of files. The list of files is found by enumerating the tags and file specifications given by the 'Files' parameter. From this list, any files not matched by the 'Filter' parameter are removed, followed by any files matched by the 'Except' parameter.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "BaseDir",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "DirectoryReference",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Set the base directory to resolve relative paths and patterns against. If set, any absolute patterns (for example, /Engine/Build/...) are taken to be relative to this path. If not, they are taken to be truly absolute.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Files",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileSpec",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Set of files to work from, including wildcards and tag names, separated by semicolons. If set, resolved relative to BaseDir, otherwise resolved to the branch root directory.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileLists",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileSpec",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Set of text files to add additional files from. Each file list should have one file per line.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Filter",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileSpec",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Patterns to filter the list of files by, including tag names or wildcards. If set, may include patterns that apply to the base directory. If not specified, defaults to all files.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Except",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileSpec",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Set of patterns to exclude from the matched list. May include tag names of patterns that apply to the base directory.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "With",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "TagList",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Name of the tag to apply.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Condition",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Whether to execute this task. It is ignored if this condition evaluates to false.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "TagReceipt",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Task that tags build products and/or runtime dependencies by reading from *.target files.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Files",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileSpec",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Set of receipt files (*.target) to read, including wildcards and tag names, separated by semicolons.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "EngineDir",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "DirectoryReference",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Path to the Engine folder, used to expand $(EngineDir) properties in receipt files. Defaults to the Engine directory for the current workspace.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "ProjectDir",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "DirectoryReference",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Path to the project folder, used to expand $(ProjectDir) properties in receipt files. Defaults to the Engine directory for the current workspace -- DEPRECATED.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "BuildProducts",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Boolean",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Whether to tag the Build Products listed in receipts.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "BuildProductType",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Which type of Build Products to tag (see TargetReceipt.cs - UnrealBuildTool.BuildProductType for valid values).",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "RuntimeDependencies",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Boolean",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Whether to tag the Runtime Dependencies listed in receipts.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "StagedFileType",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Which type of Runtime Dependencies to tag (see TargetReceipt.cs - UnrealBuildTool.StagedFileType for valid values).",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "With",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "TagList",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Name of the tag to apply.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Condition",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Whether to execute this task. It is ignored if this condition evaluates to false.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Unzip",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Extract files from a zip archive.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "ZipFile",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileSpec",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Path to the zip file to extract.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "ToDir",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "DirectoryReference",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Output directory for the extracted files.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "UseLegacyUnzip",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Boolean",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Whether or not to use the legacy unzip code.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "OverwriteFiles",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Boolean",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Whether or not to overwrite files during unzip.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Tag",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "TagList",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Tag to be applied to the extracted files.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Condition",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Whether to execute this task. It is ignored if this condition evaluates to false.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Upload",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Uploads a set of files to Jupiter for future retrival",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FromDir",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "DirectoryReference",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The directory to read compressed files from.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Files",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileSpec",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "List of file specifications separated by semicolons (for example, <code>*.cpp;Engine/.../*.bat</code>), or the name of a tag set. Relative paths are taken from FromDir.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "JupiterNamespace",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The jupiter namespace used to upload the build. Used to control who has access to the build.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "JupiterKey",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The key of the build as will be used to download the build again. This has to be globally unique for this particular upload.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "ArchiveType",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The type of archive these files are from, will be added to the metadata",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "ProjectName",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The name of the project this set of files are associated with, will be added to the metadata",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Branch",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The source control branch these files were generated from, will be added to the metadata",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Changelist",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The source control revision these files were generated from, will be added to the metadata",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "JupiterUrl",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Specify the url to the Jupiter instance to upload to",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "AdditionalMetadata",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Semi-colon separated list of '=' separated key value mappings to add to the metadata. E.g. Foo=bar;spam=eggs",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "LimitMemoryUsage",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Boolean",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If enabled file content is not kept in memory, results in lower memory usage but increased io as file contents needs to be read multiple times (for hashing as well as during upload)",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Condition",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Whether to execute this task. It is ignored if this condition evaluates to false.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Wait",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Waits a defined number of seconds.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Seconds",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Integer",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Number of seconds to wait.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Condition",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Whether to execute this task. It is ignored if this condition evaluates to false.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "WriteJsonValue",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Modifies json files by setting a value specified in the key path",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "File",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileSpec",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Json file(s) which will be modified",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Key",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Json element to set in each file. Syntax for this string is a limited subset of JsonPath notation, and may support object properties and array indices. Any array indices which are omitted or out of range will add a new element to the array (eg. '$.foo.bar[]' will add an element to the 'bar' array in the 'foo' object).",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Value",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "New value to set. May be any value JSON value (string, array, object, number, boolean or null).",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Condition",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Whether to execute this task. It is ignored if this condition evaluates to false.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "WriteTextFile",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Writes text to a file.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "File",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileReference",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Path to the file to write.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Append",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Boolean",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional, whether or not to append to the file rather than overwrite.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Text",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The text to write to the file.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Files",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileSpec",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If specified, causes the given list of files to be printed after the given message.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Tag",

                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }

          [

              "content": "TagList",
              "settings": {

              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {

              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Tag to be applied to build products of this task.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "If",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",

              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Whether to execute this task. It is ignored if this condition evaluates to false.",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "ZenExportSnapshot",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Exports an snapshot from Zen to a specified destination.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Project",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileReference",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The project from which to export the snapshot",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Platform",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The target platform(s) to export the snapshot for",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "SnapshotDescriptorFile",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "FileReference",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "A file to create with information about the snapshot that was exported",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "DestinationStorageType",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }

          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Required",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The type of destination to export the snapshot to (cloud, ...)",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "DestinationCloudHost",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }

            {
              "type": "paragraph",

              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The host name to use when exporting to a cloud destination",

                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "DestinationCloudNamespace",
              "settings": {

              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "String",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "Optional",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "paragraph",
              "content": "The namespace to use when exporting to a cloud destination",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
